strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong track record of open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume despite being required stack
Lack of clear evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in enterprise backend services (only listed in skills)
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates 6+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS, along with direct AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq — aligning strongly with core responsibilities. However, there is no evidence of using Nest.js or Vitest, which are explicitly required; Kotlin/Java usage is only listed in skills without project context, and while GitHub shows DLang and Node.js projects, the absence of required stack tools raises risk. His open-source leadership and cross-stack adaptability are significant strengths, but missing stack specifics reduce confidence in immediate productivity.
